title: JWT secret is CI test token in production
detail: JWT_SECRET=ci-test-jwt-secret-not-for-production-use-only in .env; confirmed in running container. Forged tokens possible.

title: API NODE_ENV=development in production
detail: docker-compose.yml sets NODE_ENV:development for api service. Swagger UI exposed at /api/docs unauthenticated.

title: Fake/stub health endpoints for Worker and PDF
detail: GET /api/health/worker always returns ok with TODO comment. Worker crash is invisible to monitoring.

title: Hardcoded fallback secrets in source code
detail: JWT and S3 fallback secrets hardcoded in auth.module.ts / jwt.strategy.ts / storage.service.ts / worker main.ts

title: Hardcoded personal server path in worker
detail: VEXEL_ROOT defaults to /home/munaim/srv/apps/vexel. Not set in docker-compose. Backup jobs broken on any other server.

title: Weak Postgres and MinIO passwords in version-controlled compose
Worker directly mutates encounter status via raw Prisma (bypasses command endpoint)
detail: prisma.encounter.updateMany({data:{status:'published'}}) in document-render.processor.ts bypasses service-layer state machine guard

title: E2E Playwright tests cannot run in this environment
detail: Missing libatk-1.0.so.0 system library; historical CI pass claimed but not reproduced in this audit run

title: Only one tenant in production; cross-tenant isolation not live-tested
detail: Schema and service-layer isolation confirmed correct by code review; live cross-tenant test not possible

title: Admin and Operator containers show unhealthy in docker compose ps
detail: healthcheck: disable: true for Next.js containers; they serve correctly but monitoring shows unhealthy
